warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.
notes: W4+W6 regression vs baselines #1229 (W1+W2 PASS) and #1250 (W3 PASS). Same method: CDP-over-WebSocket (Chrome 148, port 9222), reused #1250 room https://zeta-ai.io/ko/rooms/4f62a385-9043-4a34-aa43-486f8e637612 (already logged in as 신승우). Real React-controlled <textarea> (placeholder '내용 입력하기'). REGRESSION GUARD: tab carried #1250 residue (warnCount=1, blockCount=1) on first inspect; re-navigated to the room to get a clean baseline (warnCount=0, blockCount=0 confirmed) so the rendered warning is provably NEW, not residue. Submit via reused cdp_typesend2_1229.ps1: clear+focus textarea via Input.dispatchMouseEvent, Input.insertText (Korean RRN from UTF-8 file, 24 chars intact), Input.dispatchKeyEvent Enter (trusted keydown). No transient error dialog this run (unlike #1250). Textarea cleared to '' on Enter (send fired). Warning rendered as a fresh assistant bubble (warnCount 0->1, blockCount 0->1) and was already present at the 2s mark; held stable through the full 60s window. Warning text byte-identical to #1229/#1250. RRN user message text was visible in DOM (rrnEchoed=true, same as #1250) but request still blocked (no AI roleplay reply to the RRN; warning shown instead). W1 (block) + W2 (warning render) + W4/W6 (regression stability across repeated runs) all confirmed.
